page_title: Zankoku na Tenshi no These/FLY ME TO THE MOON (2003 single)
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-3041, it was released on 26 March 2003. https://vgmdb.net/album/35756 It was released as part of Evangelion's tenth anniversary.

Tracklist

Staff

Track-01
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi

Track-02
Lyrics: Bart Howard
Composition: Bart Howard
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Claire Littley
